Red Dragon
Sea Hero

Triggers: Once in a while

Song of Resurrection
When an ally dies, resurrects that ally with 20% health and casts a shield on that ally that absorbs 50% damage. The shield lasts for 5 sec. Also during this time, the resurrected unit restores 20% of their max health.

Additionally, once in a while when the artifact owner dies, the unit is resurrected with 20% health and gains a shield that absorbs 50% damage. The shield lasts for 5 sec. During this time, the artifact owner restores 20% health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚
